es.PrivacyPipedaDescription: Si usted es residente de Canada, su informacion personal esta protegida por la Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA), aplicada por la Office of the Privacy Commissioner of Canada (OPC). PrTask respeta los diez Fair Information Principles: responsabilidad, determinacion de fines, consentimiento, limitacion de la recopilacion, limitacion del uso y la divulgacion, exactitud, salvaguardas, apertura, acceso individual y posibilidad de impugnar el cumplimiento. Usted tiene derecho a acceder a su informacion personal y cuestionar su exactitud. PrTask respondera a las solicitudes de acceso dentro de 30 dias. Contacte con privacy@prtask.com para ejercer sus derechos o presentar una reclamacion.
es.PrivacyPiplDescription: Si se encuentra en China, su informacion personal esta protegida por la Personal Information Protection Law (PIPL), aplicada por la Cyberspace Administration of China (CAC). PrTask no agrupa el consentimiento para multiples finalidades de tratamiento y obtiene un consentimiento separado para la informacion personal sensible. Usted tiene derecho a conocer y decidir sobre el tratamiento, restringir o rechazar el tratamiento, acceder y copiar sus datos, solicitar la portabilidad de los datos, corregir datos inexactos, solicitar la eliminacion y pedir una explicacion de las reglas de tratamiento. PrTask realiza Personal Information Protection Impact Assessments cuando es obligatorio. Contacte con dpo@prtask.com para ejercer sus derechos.
es.PrivacyRa10173Description: Si usted es ciudadano o residente de Filipinas, sus datos personales estan protegidos por la Republic Act No. 10173 (Data Privacy Act of 2012), aplicada por la National Privacy Commission (NPC). PrTask cumple los principios de transparencia, finalidad legitima y proporcionalidad. Usted tiene derecho a ser informado del proposito y alcance del tratamiento, acceder a sus datos personales, oponerse al tratamiento, solicitar la supresion o bloqueo de datos personales, rectificar datos inexactos, presentar una reclamacion ante la NPC y reclamar indemnizacion por tratamiento no autorizado. PrTask ha designado un Data Protection Officer y se registrara ante la NPC cuando asi se exija a las entidades que tratan informacion personal sensible. Contacte con nuestro DPO en dpo@prtask.com para ejercer sus derechos.

fil.PrivacyPipedaDescription: Kung ikaw ay resident ng Canada, ang iyong personal na impormasyon ay protektado sa ilalim ng Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA), na ipinapatupad ng Office of the Privacy Commissioner of Canada (OPC). Sinusunod ng PrTask ang sampung Fair Information Principles: accountability, identifying purposes, consent, limiting collection, limiting use and disclosure, accuracy, safeguards, openness, individual access, at challenging compliance. May karapatan kang i-access ang iyong personal na impormasyon at kuwestiyunin ang katumpakan nito. Tutugon ang PrTask sa mga access request sa loob ng 30 araw. Makipag-ugnayan sa privacy@prtask.com upang gamitin ang iyong mga karapatan o magsampa ng reklamo.
fil.PrivacyPiplDescription: Kung ikaw ay nasa China, ang iyong personal na impormasyon ay protektado sa ilalim ng Personal Information Protection Law (PIPL), na ipinapatupad ng Cyberspace Administration of China (CAC). Hindi pinagsasama ng PrTask ang consent para sa maraming layunin ng pagproseso at kumukuha ito ng hiwalay na consent para sa sensitibong personal na impormasyon. May karapatan kang malaman at magpasya tungkol sa pagproseso, limitahan o tanggihan ang pagproseso, i-access at kopyahin ang iyong data, humiling ng data portability, itama ang maling data, humiling ng deletion, at humiling ng paliwanag tungkol sa mga patakaran sa pagproseso. Nagsasagawa ang PrTask ng Personal Information Protection Impact Assessments kung hinihingi. Makipag-ugnayan sa dpo@prtask.com upang gamitin ang iyong mga karapatan.
fil.PrivacyRa10173Description: Kung ikaw ay mamamayan o residente ng Pilipinas, ang iyong personal na data ay protektado sa ilalim ng Republic Act No. 10173 (Data Privacy Act of 2012), na ipinapatupad ng National Privacy Commission (NPC). Sumusunod ang PrTask sa mga prinsipyo ng transparency, legitimate purpose, at proportionality. May karapatan kang malaman ang layunin at lawak ng pagproseso, i-access ang iyong personal na data, tumutol sa pagproseso, humiling ng erasure o blocking ng personal na data, itama ang maling data, magsampa ng reklamo sa NPC, at humingi ng danyos para sa hindi awtorisadong pagproseso. Nagtalaga ang PrTask ng Data Protection Officer at magpaparehistro sa NPC kapag kinakailangan para sa mga entity na nagpoproseso ng sensitibong personal na impormasyon. Makipag-ugnayan sa aming DPO sa dpo@prtask.com upang gamitin ang iyong mga karapatan.

fr.PrivacyPipedaDescription: Si vous etes resident du Canada, vos informations personnelles sont protegees par la Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA), appliquee par l'Office of the Privacy Commissioner of Canada (OPC). PrTask respecte les dix Fair Information Principles : responsabilite, definition des finalites, consentement, limitation de la collecte, limitation de l'utilisation et de la communication, exactitude, mesures de protection, transparence, acces individuel et contestation de la conformite. Vous avez le droit d'acceder a vos informations personnelles et d'en contester l'exactitude. PrTask repondra aux demandes d'acces dans un delai de 30 jours. Contactez privacy@prtask.com pour exercer vos droits ou deposer une plainte.
fr.PrivacyPiplDescription: Si vous vous trouvez en Chine, vos informations personnelles sont protegees par la Personal Information Protection Law (PIPL), appliquee par la Cyberspace Administration of China (CAC). PrTask ne regroupe pas le consentement pour plusieurs finalites de traitement et obtient un consentement distinct pour les informations personnelles sensibles. Vous avez le droit de connaitre et de decider du traitement, de limiter ou refuser le traitement, d'acceder a vos donnees et d'en obtenir une copie, de demander la portabilite des donnees, de corriger des donnees inexactes, de demander la suppression et de solliciter une explication des regles de traitement. PrTask realise des Personal Information Protection Impact Assessments lorsque cela est requis. Contactez dpo@prtask.com pour exercer vos droits.
fr.PrivacyRa10173Description: Si vous etes citoyen ou resident des Philippines, vos donnees personnelles sont protegees par la Republic Act No. 10173 (Data Privacy Act of 2012), appliquee par la National Privacy Commission (NPC). PrTask respecte les principes de transparence, de finalite legitime et de proportionnalite. Vous avez le droit d'etre informe de la finalite et de la portee du traitement, d'acceder a vos donnees personnelles, de vous opposer au traitement, de demander l'effacement ou le blocage des donnees personnelles, de rectifier des donnees inexactes, de deposer une plainte aupres de la NPC et de reclamer des dommages-interets pour un traitement non autorise. PrTask a nomme un Data Protection Officer et s'enregistrera aupres de la NPC lorsque cela est exige pour les entites traitant des informations personnelles sensibles. Contactez notre DPO a dpo@prtask.com pour exercer vos droits.

hi.PrivacyPipedaDescription: Yadi aap Canada ke resident hain, to aapki personal information Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA) ke tahat surakshit hai, jise Office of the Privacy Commissioner of Canada (OPC) lagu karta hai. PrTask das Fair Information Principles ka palan karta hai: accountability, identifying purposes, consent, limiting collection, limiting use and disclosure, accuracy, safeguards, openness, individual access, aur challenging compliance. Aapko apni personal information tak access karne aur uski accuracy ko challenge karne ka adhikar hai. PrTask 30 din ke andar access requests ka uttar dega. Apne adhikar prayog karne ya complaint darj karne ke liye privacy@prtask.com par sampark karein.
hi.PrivacyPiplDescription: Yadi aap China me hain, to aapki personal information Personal Information Protection Law (PIPL) ke tahat surakshit hai, jise Cyberspace Administration of China (CAC) lagu karti hai. PrTask multiple processing purposes ke liye bundled consent nahi leta aur sensitive personal information ke liye separate consent prapt karta hai. Aapko processing ke bare me jaanne aur nirnay lene, processing ko restrict ya refuse karne, apne data ko access aur copy karne, data portability ka anurodh karne, inaccurate data ko correct karne, deletion ka anurodh karne, aur processing rules ka explanation mangne ka adhikar hai. PrTask avashyakta anusar Personal Information Protection Impact Assessments karta hai. Apne adhikar prayog karne ke liye dpo@prtask.com par sampark karein.
hi.PrivacyRa10173Description: Yadi aap Philippines ke nagarik ya resident hain, to aapka personal data Republic Act No. 10173 (Data Privacy Act of 2012) ke tahat surakshit hai, jise National Privacy Commission (NPC) lagu karti hai. PrTask transparency, legitimate purpose, aur proportionality ke principles ka palan karta hai. Aapko processing ke purpose aur scope ki jankari pane, apne personal data tak access karne, processing ka virodh karne, personal data ki erasure ya blocking ka anurodh karne, inaccurate data ko rectify karne, NPC ke samne complaint darj karne, aur unauthorized processing ke liye damages ka claim karne ka adhikar hai. PrTask ne ek Data Protection Officer niyukt kiya hai aur jab sensitive personal information process karne wali entities ke liye avashyak ho to NPC ke sath registration karega. Apne adhikar prayog karne ke liye hamare DPO se dpo@prtask.com par sampark karein.

id.PrivacyPipedaDescription: Jika Anda adalah penduduk Kanada, informasi pribadi Anda dilindungi berdasarkan Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA), yang ditegakkan oleh Office of the Privacy Commissioner of Canada (OPC). PrTask mematuhi sepuluh Fair Information Principles: accountability, identifying purposes, consent, limiting collection, limiting use and disclosure, accuracy, safeguards, openness, individual access, dan challenging compliance. Anda berhak mengakses informasi pribadi Anda dan menantang keakuratannya. PrTask akan menanggapi permintaan akses dalam waktu 30 hari. Hubungi privacy@prtask.com untuk menggunakan hak Anda atau mengajukan pengaduan.
id.PrivacyPiplDescription: Jika Anda berada di Tiongkok, informasi pribadi Anda dilindungi berdasarkan Personal Information Protection Law (PIPL), yang ditegakkan oleh Cyberspace Administration of China (CAC). PrTask tidak menggabungkan consent untuk beberapa tujuan pemrosesan dan memperoleh consent terpisah untuk informasi pribadi yang sensitif. Anda berhak mengetahui dan memutuskan mengenai pemrosesan, membatasi atau menolak pemrosesan, mengakses dan menyalin data Anda, meminta portabilitas data, memperbaiki data yang tidak akurat, meminta penghapusan, dan meminta penjelasan atas aturan pemrosesan. PrTask melakukan Personal Information Protection Impact Assessments sesuai kebutuhan. Hubungi dpo@prtask.com untuk menggunakan hak Anda.
id.PrivacyRa10173Description: Jika Anda adalah warga negara atau penduduk Filipina, data pribadi Anda dilindungi berdasarkan Republic Act No. 10173 (Data Privacy Act of 2012), yang ditegakkan oleh National Privacy Commission (NPC). PrTask mematuhi prinsip transparency, legitimate purpose, dan proportionality. Anda berhak diberi tahu mengenai tujuan dan cakupan pemrosesan, mengakses data pribadi Anda, menolak pemrosesan, meminta penghapusan atau pemblokiran data pribadi, memperbaiki data yang tidak akurat, mengajukan pengaduan kepada NPC, dan menuntut ganti rugi atas pemrosesan yang tidak sah. PrTask telah menunjuk seorang Data Protection Officer dan akan mendaftar pada NPC jika diwajibkan bagi entitas yang memproses informasi pribadi sensitif. Hubungi DPO kami di dpo@prtask.com untuk menggunakan hak Anda.

it.PrivacyPipedaDescription: Se sei residente in Canada, le tue informazioni personali sono protette ai sensi della Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA), applicata dall'Office of the Privacy Commissioner of Canada (OPC). PrTask aderisce ai dieci Fair Information Principles: accountability, identifying purposes, consent, limiting collection, limiting use and disclosure, accuracy, safeguards, openness, individual access e challenging compliance. Hai il diritto di accedere alle tue informazioni personali e di contestarne l'accuratezza. PrTask rispondera alle richieste di accesso entro 30 giorni. Contatta privacy@prtask.com per esercitare i tuoi diritti o presentare un reclamo.
it.PrivacyPiplDescription: Se ti trovi in Cina, le tue informazioni personali sono protette ai sensi della Personal Information Protection Law (PIPL), applicata dalla Cyberspace Administration of China (CAC). PrTask non raggruppa il consenso per piu finalita di trattamento e ottiene un consenso separato per le informazioni personali sensibili. Hai il diritto di conoscere e decidere in merito al trattamento, limitare o rifiutare il trattamento, accedere ai tuoi dati e copiarli, richiedere la portabilita dei dati, correggere dati inesatti, richiedere la cancellazione e chiedere una spiegazione delle regole di trattamento. PrTask svolge Personal Information Protection Impact Assessments quando richiesto. Contatta dpo@prtask.com per esercitare i tuoi diritti.
it.PrivacyRa10173Description: Se sei cittadino o residente delle Filippine, i tuoi dati personali sono protetti ai sensi della Republic Act No. 10173 (Data Privacy Act of 2012), applicata dalla National Privacy Commission (NPC). PrTask rispetta i principi di transparency, legitimate purpose e proportionality. Hai il diritto di essere informato sulla finalita e sull'estensione del trattamento, accedere ai tuoi dati personali, opporti al trattamento, richiedere la cancellazione o il blocco dei dati personali, rettificare dati inesatti, presentare un reclamo alla NPC e richiedere un risarcimento per trattamento non autorizzato. PrTask ha nominato un Data Protection Officer e si registrera presso la NPC quando richiesto per le entita che trattano informazioni personali sensibili. Contatta il nostro DPO all'indirizzo dpo@prtask.com per esercitare i tuoi diritti.

ja.PrivacyPipedaDescription: あなたが Canada の resident である場合、あなたの personal information は Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA) により保護され、Office of the Privacy Commissioner of Canada (OPC) がこれを執行します。PrTask は、accountability、identifying purposes、consent、limiting collection、limiting use and disclosure、accuracy、safeguards、openness、individual access、challenging compliance から成る 10 の Fair Information Principles を遵守します。あなたには、自身の personal information にアクセスし、その正確性に異議を唱える権利があります。PrTask は 30 日以内に access requests に対応します。権利の行使または complaint の提出については、privacy@prtask.com までご連絡ください。
ja.PrivacyPiplDescription: あなたが China に所在する場合、あなたの personal information は Personal Information Protection Law (PIPL) により保護され、Cyberspace Administration of China (CAC) がこれを執行します。PrTask は複数の processing purposes について bundled consent を行わず、sensitive personal information については separate consent を取得します。あなたには、processing について知り判断する権利、processing を restrict または refuse する権利、自身の data に access し copy する権利、data portability を請求する権利、inaccurate data を correct する権利、deletion を請求する権利、および processing rules の explanation を求める権利があります。PrTask は必要に応じて Personal Information Protection Impact Assessments を実施します。権利を行使するには dpo@prtask.com までご連絡ください。
ja.PrivacyRa10173Description: あなたが Philippines の citizen または resident である場合、あなたの personal data は Republic Act No. 10173 (Data Privacy Act of 2012) により保護され、National Privacy Commission (NPC) がこれを執行します。PrTask は transparency、legitimate purpose、proportionality の原則を遵守します。あなたには、processing の purpose と extent について informed である権利、自身の personal data へ access する権利、processing に objection する権利、personal data の erasure または blocking を求める権利、inaccurate data を rectify する権利、NPC に complaint を提出する権利、および unauthorized processing に対して damages を請求する権利があります。PrTask は Data Protection Officer を任命しており、sensitive personal information を処理する entities に求められる場合は NPC への registration を行います。権利を行使するには、当社の DPO である dpo@prtask.com までご連絡ください。

ko.PrivacyPipedaDescription: 귀하가 Canada의 resident인 경우 귀하의 personal information은 Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA)에 따라 보호되며, Office of the Privacy Commissioner of Canada (OPC)가 이를 집행합니다. PrTask는 accountability, identifying purposes, consent, limiting collection, limiting use and disclosure, accuracy, safeguards, openness, individual access, challenging compliance의 10가지 Fair Information Principles를 준수합니다. 귀하는 자신의 personal information에 access하고 그 accuracy에 이의를 제기할 권리가 있습니다. PrTask는 30일 이내에 access requests에 응답합니다. 귀하의 rights를 행사하거나 complaint를 제기하려면 privacy@prtask.com으로 연락해 주십시오.
ko.PrivacyPiplDescription: 귀하가 China에 있는 경우 귀하의 personal information은 Personal Information Protection Law (PIPL)에 따라 보호되며, Cyberspace Administration of China (CAC)가 이를 집행합니다. PrTask는 여러 processing purposes에 대해 bundled consent를 하지 않으며, sensitive personal information에 대해서는 separate consent를 받습니다. 귀하는 processing에 대해 알고 결정할 권리, processing을 restrict 또는 refuse할 권리, 자신의 data에 access하고 copy할 권리, data portability를 요청할 권리, inaccurate data를 correct할 권리, deletion을 요청할 권리, 그리고 processing rules에 대한 explanation을 요청할 권리가 있습니다. PrTask는 필요에 따라 Personal Information Protection Impact Assessments를 수행합니다. 귀하의 rights를 행사하려면 dpo@prtask.com으로 연락해 주십시오.
ko.PrivacyRa10173Description: 귀하가 Philippines의 citizen 또는 resident인 경우 귀하의 personal data는 Republic Act No. 10173 (Data Privacy Act of 2012)에 따라 보호되며, National Privacy Commission (NPC)가 이를 집행합니다. PrTask는 transparency, legitimate purpose, proportionality 원칙을 준수합니다. 귀하는 processing의 purpose와 extent에 대해 informed될 권리, 자신의 personal data에 access할 권리, processing에 objection할 권리, personal data의 erasure 또는 blocking을 요청할 권리, inaccurate data를 rectify할 권리, NPC에 complaint를 제기할 권리, 그리고 unauthorized processing에 대해 damages를 청구할 권리가 있습니다. PrTask는 Data Protection Officer를 임명했으며, sensitive personal information을 처리하는 entities에 요구되는 경우 NPC에 registration을 진행합니다. 귀하의 rights를 행사하려면 당사의 DPO인 dpo@prtask.com으로 연락해 주십시오.

nl.PrivacyPipedaDescription: Als u inwoner van Canada bent, worden uw persoonsgegevens beschermd onder de Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA), die wordt gehandhaafd door het Office of the Privacy Commissioner of Canada (OPC). PrTask volgt de tien Fair Information Principles: verantwoordelijkheid, het bepalen van doeleinden, toestemming, beperking van verzameling, beperking van gebruik en openbaarmaking, juistheid, waarborgen, openheid, individuele toegang en het kunnen aanvechten van naleving. U hebt het recht om toegang te krijgen tot uw persoonsgegevens en de juistheid ervan te betwisten. PrTask zal binnen 30 dagen op toegangsverzoeken reageren. Neem contact op met privacy@prtask.com om uw rechten uit te oefenen of een klacht in te dienen.
nl.PrivacyPiplDescription: Als u zich in China bevindt, worden uw persoonsgegevens beschermd onder de Personal Information Protection Law (PIPL), die wordt gehandhaafd door de Cyberspace Administration of China (CAC). PrTask bundelt geen toestemming voor meerdere verwerkingsdoeleinden en verkrijgt afzonderlijke toestemming voor gevoelige persoonsgegevens. U hebt het recht om kennis te nemen van en te beslissen over verwerking, verwerking te beperken of te weigeren, toegang te krijgen tot en kopieen van uw gegevens te verkrijgen, dataportabiliteit te verzoeken, onjuiste gegevens te corrigeren, verwijdering te verzoeken en uitleg over de verwerkingsregels te vragen. PrTask voert Personal Information Protection Impact Assessments uit wanneer dat vereist is. Neem contact op met dpo@prtask.com om uw rechten uit te oefenen.
nl.PrivacyRa10173Description: Als u burger of inwoner van de Filipijnen bent, worden uw persoonsgegevens beschermd onder Republic Act No. 10173 (Data Privacy Act of 2012), die wordt gehandhaafd door de National Privacy Commission (NPC). PrTask volgt de beginselen van transparantie, legitiem doel en proportionaliteit. U hebt het recht om te worden geinformeerd over het doel en de omvang van de verwerking, toegang te krijgen tot uw persoonsgegevens, bezwaar te maken tegen verwerking, verwijdering of blokkering van persoonsgegevens te verzoeken, onjuiste gegevens te corrigeren, een klacht in te dienen bij de NPC en schadevergoeding te eisen voor ongeoorloofde verwerking. PrTask heeft een Data Protection Officer aangesteld en zal zich bij de NPC registreren wanneer dat vereist is voor entiteiten die gevoelige persoonsgegevens verwerken. Neem contact op met onze DPO via dpo@prtask.com om uw rechten uit te oefenen.

pt.PrivacyPipedaDescription: Se voce for residente do Canada, suas informacoes pessoais estarao protegidas pela Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA), aplicada pelo Office of the Privacy Commissioner of Canada (OPC). O PrTask segue os dez Fair Information Principles: accountability, identifying purposes, consent, limiting collection, limiting use and disclosure, accuracy, safeguards, openness, individual access e challenging compliance. Voce tem o direito de acessar suas informacoes pessoais e contestar sua exatidao. O PrTask respondera aos pedidos de acesso em ate 30 dias. Entre em contato com privacy@prtask.com para exercer seus direitos ou apresentar uma reclamacao.
pt.PrivacyPiplDescription: Se voce estiver na China, suas informacoes pessoais estarao protegidas pela Personal Information Protection Law (PIPL), aplicada pela Cyberspace Administration of China (CAC). O PrTask nao agrupa o consentimento para multiplas finalidades de processamento e obtem consentimento separado para informacoes pessoais sensiveis. Voce tem o direito de conhecer e decidir sobre o processamento, restringir ou recusar o processamento, acessar e copiar seus dados, solicitar portabilidade de dados, corrigir dados inexatos, solicitar a exclusao e pedir uma explicacao das regras de processamento. O PrTask realiza Personal Information Protection Impact Assessments quando exigido. Entre em contato com dpo@prtask.com para exercer seus direitos.
pt.PrivacyRa10173Description: Se voce for cidadao ou residente das Filipinas, seus dados pessoais estarao protegidos pela Republic Act No. 10173 (Data Privacy Act of 2012), aplicada pela National Privacy Commission (NPC). O PrTask segue os principios de transparency, legitimate purpose e proportionality. Voce tem o direito de ser informado sobre a finalidade e o alcance do processamento, acessar seus dados pessoais, se opor ao processamento, solicitar o apagamento ou bloqueio dos dados pessoais, corrigir dados inexatos, apresentar uma reclamacao a NPC e pleitear indenizacao por processamento nao autorizado. O PrTask nomeou um Data Protection Officer e se registrara perante a NPC quando isso for exigido para entidades que processam informacoes pessoais sensiveis. Entre em contato com nosso DPO em dpo@prtask.com para exercer seus direitos.

ru.PrivacyPipedaDescription: Если вы являетесь жителем Канады, ваша персональная информация защищена в соответствии с Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA), исполнение которого обеспечивает Office of the Privacy Commissioner of Canada (OPC). PrTask соблюдает десять Fair Information Principles: ответственность, определение целей, согласие, ограничение сбора, ограничение использования и раскрытия, точность, меры защиты, открытость, индивидуальный доступ и возможность оспаривать соблюдение. Вы имеете право получить доступ к своей персональной информации и оспорить ее точность. PrTask ответит на запросы о доступе в течение 30 дней. Свяжитесь с privacy@prtask.com, чтобы реализовать свои права или подать жалобу.
ru.PrivacyPiplDescription: Если вы находитесь в Китае, ваша персональная информация защищена в соответствии с Personal Information Protection Law (PIPL), исполнение которой обеспечивает Cyberspace Administration of China (CAC). PrTask не объединяет согласие для нескольких целей обработки и получает отдельное согласие на обработку чувствительной персональной информации. Вы имеете право знать об обработке и принимать решения относительно нее, ограничивать или отказываться от обработки, получать доступ к своим данным и копировать их, запрашивать переносимость данных, исправлять неточные данные, требовать удаления и запрашивать объяснение правил обработки. PrTask проводит Personal Information Protection Impact Assessments, когда это требуется. Свяжитесь с dpo@prtask.com, чтобы реализовать свои права.
ru.PrivacyRa10173Description: Если вы являетесь гражданином или жителем Филиппин, ваши персональные данные защищены в соответствии с Republic Act No. 10173 (Data Privacy Act of 2012), исполнение которого обеспечивает National Privacy Commission (NPC). PrTask соблюдает принципы transparency, legitimate purpose и proportionality. Вы имеете право быть проинформированным о цели и объеме обработки, получать доступ к своим персональным данным, возражать против обработки, требовать удаления или блокировки персональных данных, исправлять неточные данные, подавать жалобу в NPC и требовать возмещения ущерба за несанкционированную обработку. PrTask назначил Data Protection Officer и зарегистрируется в NPC, если это потребуется для организаций, обрабатывающих чувствительную персональную информацию. Свяжитесь с нашим DPO по адресу dpo@prtask.com, чтобы реализовать свои права.

tr.PrivacyPipedaDescription: Kanada'da ikamet ediyorsaniz, kisisel bilgileriniz Office of the Privacy Commissioner of Canada (OPC) tarafindan uygulanan Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA) kapsaminda korunur. PrTask su on Fair Information Principles ilkesine uyar: accountability, identifying purposes, consent, limiting collection, limiting use and disclosure, accuracy, safeguards, openness, individual access ve challenging compliance. Kisisel bilgilerinize erisme ve bunlarin dogruluguna itiraz etme hakkina sahipsiniz. PrTask erisim taleplerine 30 gun icinde yanit verecektir. Haklarinizi kullanmak veya sikayette bulunmak icin privacy@prtask.com ile iletisime gecin.
tr.PrivacyPiplDescription: Cin'de bulunuyorsaniz, kisisel bilgileriniz Cyberspace Administration of China (CAC) tarafindan uygulanan Personal Information Protection Law (PIPL) kapsaminda korunur. PrTask birden fazla isleme amaci icin toplu consent kullanmaz ve hassas kisisel bilgiler icin ayri consent alir. Isleme hakkinda bilgi edinme ve karar verme, islemeyi kisitlama veya reddetme, verilerinize erisme ve kopyalama, data portability talep etme, hatali verileri duzeltme, deletion talep etme ve processing rules hakkinda aciklama isteme haklarina sahipsiniz. PrTask gerektiginde Personal Information Protection Impact Assessments gerceklestirir. Haklarinizi kullanmak icin dpo@prtask.com ile iletisime gecin.
tr.PrivacyRa10173Description: Filipinler vatandasi veya sakiniyseniz, kisisel verileriniz National Privacy Commission (NPC) tarafindan uygulanan Republic Act No. 10173 (Data Privacy Act of 2012) kapsaminda korunur. PrTask transparency, legitimate purpose ve proportionality ilkelerine uyar. Isleme amaci ve kapsamindan haberdar olma, kisisel verilerinize erisme, islemeye itiraz etme, kisisel verilerin silinmesini veya bloke edilmesini isteme, hatali verileri duzeltme, NPC nezdinde sikayette bulunma ve yetkisiz isleme nedeniyle tazminat talep etme haklarina sahipsiniz. PrTask bir Data Protection Officer atamistir ve hassas kisisel bilgi isleyen kuruluslar icin gerektiginde NPC nezdinde kayit yaptiracaktir. Haklarinizi kullanmak icin DPO'muz olan dpo@prtask.com ile iletisime gecin.
